name: Deadpool
post_apply_message:
Deadpool (non-Steam, delisted 2017) — setup:
1. Game folder on the SD card (GFM detects it).
2. Apply this fix — it AUTO-ADDS the Steam shortcut for you (Deadpool.exe, start dir = game folder, gospel appid) and forces Proton 9 (the version the Deck community confirms works). No manual 'add to Steam' needed. Steam closes briefly to write it.
3. DO NOT add any framerate-unlock launch option — Deadpool soft-locks with an unlocked framerate (e.g. Chapter 5 before the toilet scene). Leave it at default.
4. Only preset graphics options exist (Coalesced.ini is encrypted); pick a preset in-game.
The readme's launch target is Deadpool.exe (Binaries/DP.exe is the engine exe if the launcher misbehaves under Proton). If you hit missing-DLL errors, the crack ships vcredist_x86 + DirectX (DXSETUP) in _Redist.
notes: Deadpool (High Moon, 2013), delisted from Steam Nov 2017 (Marvel licence). Tony's copy is a cracked non-Steam build (ChemicalFlood repack; NAS \192.168.1.33\Rom_Library\roms\win\Deadpool.zip). Runs on Deck via forced Proton 9 (ProtonDB/community). Launch exe per the crack's _HOW TO RUN GAME!!.txt = Deadpool.exe (Binaries/DP.exe is the 20MB engine exe). Key gotcha: framerate unlock causes a progression soft-lock — keep default fps. No resolution config (encrypted Coalesced.ini, presets only), so no 1920x1200 ini step. Recipe is just the Proton pin + docs; add the game as a non-Steam shortcut first so proton_version can key off it.
